text:
- Update to 8.3.0

For the record, devel/git HTML documentation is incompatible with
asciidoc 8.3.0. I have contacted the maintainer of the former and he
will commit the appropriate changes once this update is committed.

Thanks to John Hein <jhein@timing.com> for patch submission.
